name: Kuldeep Mahajan
summary: Innovative AI Engineer and Product Developer with expertise in Python, Django, React, and the Microsoft Power Platform ecosystem. Proficient in AI/ML technologies, including LLM, RAG, Generative AI, and Azure AI services, with experience in training and integrating AI models. Skilled in database management, application deployment, and manual testing, ensuring reliable and high-quality software delivery. Adept at leveraging AI-powered tools to accelerate development, improve productivity, and optimize workflows. Proven track record of delivering impactful solutions through technical excellence, problem-solving, and effective collaboration while building scalable applications that drive business value.
